_source: rAthena db/pre-re/mob_race2_db.txt @ e9aea14 (pre-renewal Race2ID -> mob IDs)
_note: Monster racial groups (RC2). Maps each RC2 family to its member mob IDs. Consumed by cardFix for bAddRace2 'Bane' cards (Orc Lady -> RC2_Orc, Goblin/Kobold Leader -> RC2_Goblin/RC2_Kobold, Lava Golem -> RC2_Golem, etc.). Base pre-re list; Payon-Stories-custom mobs added to a family would need extra entries here.
